title: What to Know About the U.S.-Iran Peace Talks
summary_full: Negotiations to end the war are at an impasse over Iran’s nuclear future and the Strait of Hormuz, which remains mostly shut.
summary_public: Negotiations to end the war are at an impasse over Iran’s nuclear future and the Strait of Hormuz, which remains mostly shut.
